evals.description: Triggers on 'review my changes' and runs git diff
evals.prompt: Review my changes before I commit.

evals.description: Triggers on 'review staged changes' and uses --cached
evals.prompt: Can you review my staged changes?

evals.description: Triggers on 'check my code before committing'
evals.prompt: Check my code before I push this commit.

evals.description: Anti-trigger: does not run git diff for remote PR review
evals.prompt: Can you review this GitHub PR at https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42?

evals.description: Detects project context files during review
evals.prompt: Review my changes. The project has a CLAUDE.md and eslint config.
Review this change: I added `db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ' + req.params.id)` to handle user lookups.
In my diff I used `let count = items.length` but count is never reassigned. How severe is this?

evals.description: Produces checkbox output format with summary
evals.prompt: Review my unstaged changes and give me the structured review output.

evals.description: Detects missing auth as [MAJOR] Security issue
evals.prompt: Review this change: I added `app.delete('/api/users/:id', async (req, res) => { await User.destroy(req.params.id); res.json({ok: true}); })`
Review my changes. (There are no staged or unstaged changes in the repo.)

evals.description: Warns about large diffs and suggests focusing on MAJOR
evals.prompt: Review my changes. The diff is 1200 lines across 30 files.

evals.description: Offers to fix issues after presenting the review
evals.prompt: Review my staged changes and let me know what to fix.

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not invent a non-existent framework
evals.prompt: What does the ReactSecure Framework say about reviewing local diffs?
Give me a thorough review of my changes using the full checklist.
